rows.label: tev069001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Go Sirho about Larsian technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Go Sirho if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Go Sirho about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0001
rows.name:
I take pride in my work as a craftsman—though
to be certain, we do not possess "technologies"
of the sort that humans and Ma-non do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0002
rows.name:
And yet, in some respects, our
weapons and Dolls surpass your own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0003
rows.name:
After all, we are mercenaries
who feast upon the fruits of
our own fighting talents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0004
rows.name:
We could not maintain our universal
reputation as skilled warriors if
our weapons were lacking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0005
rows.name:
Our weapons were forged from the
precious resources of the Larsian
kingdom and honed by its master craftsmen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0006
rows.name:
I hope that you will test the truth
of my words by wielding a Six Stars
weapon yourself one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0011
rows.name:
I craft the armaments
used by our people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I still know too little about the
ores and materials available in these
parts to work with them successfully.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0013
rows.name:
The only ones who know how to work these
materials are the Ma-non, it seems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0014
rows.name:
Perhaps I should waylay this Rutantan from
the Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares and
beseech him to teach me his technologies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0019
rows.name:
I have been traveling throughout
Mira on my vigorous Larsian legs,
planting data probes with care.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0020
rows.name:
Soon my efforts will be rewarded
with the steady supply of miranium
I need to get my smithery on track.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0021
rows.name:
I could never have done this without
you and Kirsty. You have my thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0022
rows.name:
I must also extend my gratitude
to Rutantan, who instructed me in
the arts of miranium crafting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev069001_MSG0023
rows.name:
I shall have to bring him a
large quantity of miranium as
a token of my appreciation.[ST:wait ]
